zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronella de Grandmesnil於大約1135年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格藍德斯尼爾時，她的父親Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil45歲，母親Alice Stuteville48歲。她於1155年與Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 艾比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1173年登記服兵役。她去世於1212年4月1日在英國賀特福爾韋爾享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronella de Grandmesnil于大约1135年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格藍德斯尼爾时，她的父亲Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil45岁，母亲Alice Stuteville48岁。她于1155年与Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 艾比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1173年登记服兵役。她去世于1212年4月1日在英国賀特福爾韋爾享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Petronella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Fedele, Francesco, Marco, Salvatore, Vito.
Italian (southern): from Petronella, a feminine pet form of Petrone or Petronio .

variants.name: Petrone
meanings: From Latin Petronilla, originally a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Petronius (of uncertain derivation). The name Petronilla was borne by a 1st-century martyr, and early in the Christian era came to be connected with Peter , so that in many legends surrounding her she is described as a companion or even the daughter of St Peter .

en.lifeSummary: When Petronella de Grandmesnil was born about 1135, in Grandmesnil, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil, was 45 and her mother, Alice Stuteville, was 48. She married Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester in 1155, in Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She registered for military service in 1173. She died on 1 April 1212, in Ware, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronella de Grandmesnil est née environ 1135, à Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice Stuteville, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester en 1155, à Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1173. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1212, à Ware, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Groby, Leicester Castle, Leicestershire,: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Petronella de Grandmesnil um 1135 in Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil 45 und ihre Mutter Alice Stuteville 48. Sie hat 1155 in Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie hat sich 1173 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Sie starb am 1. April 1212 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Ware, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronella de Grandmesnil è nata il circa 1135 nel Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Alice Stuteville, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester nel 1155, nel Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Lei arruolato nell'esercito nel 1173. Morì il 1 aprile 1212, nel Ware, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronella de Grandmesnilが約1135年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスグランドメスニルで生まれた時，父Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnilは45歳，母Alice Stutevilleは48歳であった。1155年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスター アビーでRobert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1173年に兵役登録をした。彼女は1212年4月1日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワーで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Groby, Leicester Castle, Leicestershire,: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Petronella de Grandmesnil(이)가 대략 1135년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 그랜드메스니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Stuteville(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1155년 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 애브브이에서 Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그녀는 1212년 4월 1일 영국 허트퍼드실르 워에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronella de Grandmesnil nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stuteville, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester em 1155, em Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela alistou-se no serviço militar em 1173. Ela faleceu em 1 de abril de 1212, em Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Groby, Leicester Castle, Leicestershire,: лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronella de Grandmesnil родилась около 1135 г. в местности грандмеснил, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stuteville, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester в 1155 г. в местности лисестир эбби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1173 году она поступила на военную службу. Она умерла 1 апреля 1212 г. в местности вар, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Petronella de Grandmesnil nació aproximadamente 1135, en Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume William aka Hugues Grandmesnil, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice Stuteville, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Robert de Beaumont 3rd Earl Of Leicester en 1155, en Leicester Abbey, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1173. Murió el 1 de abril de 1212, en Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
